5.text: In the institution of baptism, which saith: Go ye, therefore, and teach all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father, and of the Son, and of the Holy Ghost. He that believeth and is baptized
We are made partakers of the redemption purchased by Christ by the effectual application of it to us by his Holy Spirit.

We are made partakers of the benefits which Christ hath procured, by the application of them unto us, which is the work of God the Holy Ghost.
            ( John 1:12–13 ; Titus 3:5–6 )
